dct_title_s:
Carte Réduite d'une partie des costes occidentales et méridionales de
          l'Afrique depuis Cabo Frio ou Cap Froid par les 19 degrés de latitude mérid.le
          jusqu'à la Baye S. Blaise pour servir aux vaisseaux Français ... par ordre de M.
          Rouille
dct_alternative_sm: Map of southwest coast of Africa from Cap Froid to the Bay of St. Blaise
dct_description_sm:
Five editions of this chart were printed. Inset: Views of Cape of Good Hope, Cape
        Agulhas and False Bay headland; Prime meridian through Paris, Ferro Island, Tenerife, Cap
        Lezard and London. Top right: 90.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
